title:

Developed by ROKETSAN, this is the largest and most powerful version of the TAYFUN family, and Türkiye’s longest-range domestic ballistic missile (range undisclosed).

•
body:
📸 Türkiye showcases its TAYFUN Block 4 hypersonic ballistic missile at SAHA 2026 in Istanbul.

Developed by ROKETSAN, this is the largest and most powerful version of the TAYFUN family, and Türkiye’s longest-range domestic ballistic missile (range undisclosed).

• Length: ~10 m
• Weight: ~7.2 tons
• Speed: Mach 5+ (hypersonic)

First unveiled at IDEF 2025, now displayed on its 8x8 launcher at SAHA.

title:
Dr. Andreas Krieg | Gulf Security Expert | Institute of Middle Eastern Studies:
 
Since October 7th, the UAE's PR has been on a downhill slope. Qatar & Saudi Arabia have become dominant in the information domain themselves - the Emirates are no longer on their own.
 
The UAE is no longer seen as adv
body:
Dr. Andreas Krieg | Gulf Security Expert | Institute of Middle Eastern Studies:
 
Since October 7th, the UAE's PR has been on a downhill slope. Qatar & Saudi Arabia have become dominant in the information domain themselves - the Emirates are no longer on their own.
 
The UAE is no longer seen as advancing stability. Arming non-state actors & secessionists - most visibly in Sudan - has made them a cause of instability. The atrocities in Sudan were a tipping point.
 
But rather than backing down, Abu Dhabi doubles down. That's their strategic culture - push through pressure rather than apologize.
 
Saudi Arabia has shown a learning curve. Qatar has changed under pressure. The UAE hasn't.
 
They're digging a deeper hole - an echo chamber where Abu Dhabi insists everyone else is wrong, despite

title:
📸 Türkiye’s new fighter jet, the Eurofighter Typhoon, is on display at SAHA 2026 in Istanbul.

Shown as a full-scale mockup, the jet features Turkish flags on its body and tail.

This marks Türkiye’s first modern fighter acquisition outside the U.S.
body:
📸 Türkiye’s new fighter jet, the Eurofighter Typhoon, is on display at SAHA 2026 in Istanbul.

Shown as a full-scale mockup, the jet features Turkish flags on its body and tail.

This marks Türkiye’s first modern fighter acquisition outside the U.S.

Trump:

Zelensky is a tricky guy, and we want to get a settlement. And, you know, they are losing territory, but it’s at a big cost to Russia and to them. And I like Zelensky.

I’ve always sort of gotten along with him, other than the one moment in the White House, which I thought was a little aggressive on his behalf.

title:

I think the Pope is endangering a lot of Catholics and a lot of people.

He thinks it’s just fine for Iran to have a nuclear weapon.

I think the Pope is endangering a lot of Catholics and a lot of people.

He thinks it’s just fine for Iran to have a nuclear weapon.

And don’t kid yourself — they watch what happened in Venezuela. They watch what happened in Iran, because militarily Iran is essentially over.

title:
Israel is coordinating with the U.S. as rising tensions in the Strait of Hormuz threaten the Iran ceasefire, according to an Israeli source.

Plans are in place for a short, targeted campaign—possibly striking Iran’s energy infrastructure and senior officials—to pressure Tehran in negotiations. 

Th
body:
Israel is coordinating with the U.S. as rising tensions in the Strait of Hormuz threaten the Iran ceasefire, according to an Israeli source.

Plans are in place for a short, targeted campaign—possibly striking Iran’s energy infrastructure and senior officials—to pressure Tehran in negotiations. 

The final decision depends on Trump, who is frustrated with stalled talks but hesitant to escalate into full-scale war.

Source: CNN

title:
🥷 Türkiye’s Ninja Missile

📸 ROKETSAN unveils Neşter smart gliding munition at SAHA 2026 in Istanbul. 

— A variant of the MAM-L, it minimizes collateral damage by using a proximity sensor and a unique warhead with deployable cutting blades that activate just before impact. 

— Instead of using expl
body:
🥷 Türkiye’s Ninja Missile

📸 ROKETSAN unveils Neşter smart gliding munition at SAHA 2026 in Istanbul. 

— A variant of the MAM-L, it minimizes collateral damage by using a proximity sensor and a unique warhead with deployable cutting blades that activate just before impact. 

— Instead of using explosives, it neutralizes targets through direct, high-precision kinetic action, making it suitable for pinpoint strikes rather than area destruction.

title:

The move—backed by Social Democrats and far-right parties—raises concerns about political instability, EU funding, and the currency.

President Nicușor Dan will now consult pa
body:
Romania’s parliament ousted Prime Minister Ilie Bolojan in a no-confidence vote, collapsing his pro-EU minority government.

The move—backed by Social Democrats and far-right parties—raises concerns about political instability, EU funding, and the currency.

President Nicușor Dan will now consult parties to form a new government.

title:
🖋 В продовження посту про ротації та довготривале перебування бійців на позиціях 

🔖 Після новини про видачу наказу "щодо обов’язкової ротації військовослужбовців, які виконують завдання на передньому краї" далі пішла реалізація у вигляді доведення цього наказу до відома командирів. Спілкуючись з ко
body:
🖋 В продовження посту про ротації та довготривале перебування бійців на позиціях 

🔖 Після новини про видачу наказу "щодо обов’язкової ротації військовослужбовців, які виконують завдання на передньому краї" далі пішла реалізація у вигляді доведення цього наказу до відома командирів. Спілкуючись з командирами про відповідні вказівки Главкома, вони висловлюють велике обурення та невдоволення, адже поставлену задачу виконати практично нереально. В бригадах немає нормального поповнення, що є якраз однією з основних причин довготривалого перебування бійців на позиціях і не дає повноцінної можливості проводити ротації. Ба більше, в багатьох бригадах ледь вистачає перекривати втрати, які завдає противник активними штурмовими діями чи роботою дронів та іншими засобами ураження. 

❗️ Як ми й зазнач

title:
Mohammad Ghalibaf, Speaker of the Iranian Parliament and head of the Iranian negotiation delegation:

The new equation in the Strait of Hormuz is being established. The US and its allies are endangering the security of shipping and energy transport as they violate the ceasefire and impose a blockade
body:
Mohammad Ghalibaf, Speaker of the Iranian Parliament and head of the Iranian negotiation delegation:

The new equation in the Strait of Hormuz is being established. The US and its allies are endangering the security of shipping and energy transport as they violate the ceasefire and impose a blockade, but the damage they cause will gradually diminish.

It is clear to us that the US is unable to tolerate the current situation – and this is when we have not even begun to act yet....

##
Words are free

According to Gaza sources, the reason for the outbreak of the confrontation is as follows:

The f
body:
Large clan feud in Gaza City: Hamas imposes curfew

Extensive exchanges of fire between operatives of Hamas’s Sahm Unit and members of the al-Kafarna clan on al-Nasr Street in Gaza City this afternoon.

According to Gaza sources, the reason for the outbreak of the confrontation is as follows:

The father of one of the young men in Gaza fired celebratory shots into the air (or at least tried to –AA) after learning that his son’s test results had arrived and that his son does not have cancer.

From the “shots in the air,” an 11-year-old girl was seriously wounded and two other children were lightly injured. A relative of the wounded drew a pistol and began shooting in response to their injuries.
The clan feud escalated, and Hamas security forces entered the scene and imposed a curfew on the

body:
Hezbollah:

IDF Spokesperson:
A short time ago, as part of the Air Force's support activity for the fighting forces in southern Lebanon, there was a failed attempt to launch a small surface-to-air missile at an aircraft. There was no damage and no casualties to our forces.

body:
Gazan sources report two fatalities and several wounded in an attack on a Hamas police caravan in the area of Bahlul junction in Gaza City a short time ago.

According to these sources, the officers who went out to deal with the clan feud with the Kafarna family earlier today ☝️came from the center that was just attacked.

##
In other words: the action of the Hamas police officers in the clan feud exposed the location of their center.

title:
📹 ‘Heavy price to pay’: Lego toon’s latest jab takes swipe at UAE’s pivot toward Israel 

👉 Iran’s most recent Lego-style animation has hit out at the UAE’s growing closeness to Israel as tensions mount in the Strait of Hormuz.

🔴 The UAE became the first Arab country in 26 years to normalize relati
body:
📹 ‘Heavy price to pay’: Lego toon’s latest jab takes swipe at UAE’s pivot toward Israel 

👉 Iran’s most recent Lego-style animation has hit out at the UAE’s growing closeness to Israel as tensions mount in the Strait of Hormuz.

🔴 The UAE became the first Arab country in 26 years to normalize relations with Israel in 2020 and has since deepened military cooperation.

🔴 Criticism, however, is not confined to Iran. Analysts say unease is also brewing in Saudi Arabia, which remains suspicious of the Emirati-Israeli partnership.

🔴 Make no mistake: Saudi Arabia's staying mum on the UAE's unilateral OPEC exit says less about approval and more about the deep fractures running through the Gulf.

🔴 Observers warn that any visible Israeli military footprint in the UAE risks further isolating Abu Dh

Designed as a cost-effective solution (~8x cheaper than peers), ENFAL-17 integrates with mobile systems and AI-suppo
body:
Türkiye unveils MKE's ENFAL-17 air defense missile at SAHA 2026, Istanbul.

• Role: Low-altitude air defense (UAVs, cruise missiles, helicopters).
• Range/Altitude: Up to ~30,000 ft.

Designed as a cost-effective solution (~8x cheaper than peers), ENFAL-17 integrates with mobile systems and AI-supported command control.

The networks channeling weapons & money to the RSF are run by non-Emir
body:
Dr. Andreas Krieg | Gulf Security Expert | Institute of Middle Eastern Studies:
 
The RSF is a genocidal militia. Some of the atrocities in Sudan may be worse than what happened in Gaza - fueled, supported & enabled by the UAE.
 
The networks channeling weapons & money to the RSF are run by non-Emiratis - often Sudanese based in the UAE, using Emirati jurisdiction to do their dirty work.
 
This gives Abu Dhabi plausible deniability - or rather implausible deniability, because you can no longer really deny it.
 
But legally, attribution is so indirect & multi-layered that Abu Dhabi will probably get away with it - unless the US has the guts to confront them directly.
 
Abu Dhabi is selling Sudan & the RSF to Washington as a fight against terrorism & the Muslim Brotherhood.
 
And the Trump a

body:
Turkey unveils its first intercontinental ballistic missile with a range of 6,000 km (according to its claim)

The research and development center of the Turkish Ministry of Defense presented the intercontinental ballistic missile - “Yildirimahan.”

• Range: 6,000 km
• Speed: Mach 9-25
• Propulsion: 4 engines
• Fuel: Nitrogen tetroxide (N₂O₄)

##
Turkish Defense Minister Yaşar Güler on the missile:
“Let there be no doubt- if necessary, we will use it without hesitation.

The liquid-fueled missile is currently our longest-range ballistic missile.”

To comment, follow this link

body:
Following up on the remarks👆 by President Trump about arming the Iranian people (against the Ayatollah regime), Republican Senator Lindsey Graham says:

We don’t need “American boots” on the ground in Iran. We have millions of boots on the ground in Iran—they just don’t have weapons (to fight the regime).

##
It appears that the American administration sees arming the Iranian population as a central and important step that will lead to the overthrow of the Iranian regime.

body:
Mild viewer warning!

The rodent plague in Gaza: a Gazan social media activist has launched a campaign to eliminate mice and rats

As part of the campaign, the Gazan activist offers payment:
1 shekel for each mouse eliminated.
5 shekels for each rat eliminated.

Anyone who wants to receive the money must present a video with "proof" and will receive a money transfer.

I’ve attached just a few examples – there are quite a few participants in the campaign.
It seems the rats and mice are flooding the Strip.
They’ve come out of their holes...

To comment, follow this link

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
У ніч на 5 травня (з 18:00 4 травня) противник атакував 11-ма балістичними ракетами Іскандер-М із Ростовської, Воронезької та Брянської областей, а також 164-ма ударними БпЛА типу Shahed (в т.ч. реактивними), Гербера, Італмас та дро
body:
⚡️ ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО БАЛІСТИЧНУ РАКЕТУ ТА 149 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА
➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
У ніч на 5 травня (з 18:00 4 травня) противник атакував 11-ма балістичними ракетами Іскандер-М із Ростовської, Воронезької та Брянської областей, а також 164-ма ударними БпЛА типу Shahed (в т.ч. реактивними), Гербера, Італмас та дронами-імітаторами типу «Пародія» із напрямків Брянськ, Курськ, Шаталово, Орел, Приморсько-Ахтарськ, Міллерово – рф., Гвардійське – ТОТ АР Крим.

Повітряний напад відбивали авіація, зенітні ракетні війська, підрозділи РЕБ та безпілотних систем, мобільні вогневі групи Сил оборони України.

💥 За попередніми даними, станом на 09.00, протиповітряною обороною збито/подавлено 1 балістичну ракету та 149 ворожих БпЛА типу Shahed, Гербера, Італмас та дронамів-імітаторів «Пародія» на півночі, півдні, сході

extra.channel_title: Air Force of the Armed Forces of Ukraine
